title: Red Pale Leaves
description: A texture pack that makes the Pale Gardens more vibrant with red leaves and vines.
body:
A fairly self-explanitory resource pack.
Replaces Pale Leaves and Hanging Moss with a red vibrant variant, called "Sanguine Leaves" and "Sanguine Hanging Moss" respectively.

Designed with the use of shaders and other leave enhancement texture packs.
